itemListElement.reviewBody: Academic wise, it's fine. But no proper regulation on fees structure. Seems they dont follow Tamil Nadu Fees regulatory Act

itemReviewed.name: Vel International Public School - Vadavalli-Thondamuthur Rd

itemListElement.reviewBody: The worst school ever....principal is very strict and act to be kind infront of parents...they give importance for the topper...not taking any effort for slow learners...teachers are not trained...students go in a wrong way. Nly english teacher speak better english...they are running this school nly for money

itemReviewed.name: Vel International Public School - Vadavalli-Thondamuthur Rd

itemListElement.reviewBody:
Very nice school. My daughters are studying here. They never hesitated to go to school. They are not that strict but firm in some scenarios which is quite good.
They are giving enough time for extra curricular activities which encourage students.

itemReviewed.name: Vel International Public School - Vadavalli-Thondamuthur Rd
Vel International Public School - Vadavalli-Thondamuthur Rd

itemListElement.reviewBody: Very worst experience on first time admission visit with my kid. There is no proper response and proper way of explanation. And the reception lady worst responses, there is no chairs to discuss about school details. Parents and kids need to stand in front of the school reception while discuss.there is no chance to give zero start rate that's the reason giving one star rate. Money minded school. Without hesitation asking 50k for school development as donation from parents. Very very very worst staff behaviour.

itemReviewed.name: Vel International Public School - Vadavalli-Thondamuthur Rd

itemListElement.reviewBody:
My daughter and son are studying in this school. the school is clean always in the front of the school. The school's playground is neat and clean. the neatness rules like nail cut,haircut are strictly followed well.the Teachers of the school are very kind and polite. They listen to every child.they explain the concept again and again clearly. The functions like annual day sports day are very good everyone enjoys it. There are many
books in the library to learn.there are competitions held in the school. My childrens are missing school on this time . One of the best school

itemReviewed.name: Vel International Public School - Vadavalli-Thondamuthur Rd

itemListElement.reviewBody:
I really had a great experience with vel...
It's not only about just schooling it's also about learning more than the book knowledge..
The school gives equal importance to both studies as well as co curricular activities...
And the teachers are kind and too friendly...
And the Teachers have supported us a lot till the end..
I thank the teachers and School for having this wonderful experience with vel...and I'm really happy to be a part of vel

itemReviewed.name: Vel International Public School - Vadavalli-Thondamuthur Rd

itemListElement.reviewBody: Such a wonderful school 🏫my 9 years if schooling in vel can't be expressed in lines....i loved it to the core..moreover teachers are very very friendly to the students more than a teacher and student it was a like bonding between a mom and son/daughter.... the school focuses more even in co curricular activities where the talent of the student is brought out the infrastructure is marvellous my parents too loved the school.....there is no word called stress according to vel...I thank every teachers for giving me love and support till the end ❤thank you so much

itemReviewed.name: Vel International Public School - Vadavalli-Thondamuthur Rd

itemListElement.reviewBody: Osm school..for ever.. I studied here for 5 years... That 5 year was unforgettable.. It's because this school was very good. Teachers were too good in teaching. They taught us to their best and the school management was good..Best school...

itemReviewed.name: Vel International Public School - Vadavalli-Thondamuthur Rd

itemListElement.reviewBody:
I am Anushya
My 5 years in vel school went so soon...more than a school , they were my family..I really miss them so much ....my teachers and friends are the boon that I got ...I am very proud to say that I was a student of vel
THANK YOU TEACHERS , FRIENDS AND THE MANAGEMENT for giving me such wonderful memories ...😇
